summary: Completed testing of WorkflowAI Compare Models feature. All new features working correctly. Backend: POST /api/compare-models requires auth (401 without cookies), returns results from all 3 models (claude, gpt, gemini) with correct structure. Frontend: /compare page loads with input textarea, 'Compare All Models' button, back to Dashboard link. Navigation from dashboard header works. Protected route redirects to /login when not authenticated.

minor.issue: Long response time (60-120+ seconds) due to 3 parallel AI model calls. May cause 502 timeout in preview environment.

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23 passed, 1 skipped for brute force + 5/6 compare tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compare Models feature fully tested. POST /api/compare-models runs 3 AI models in parallel (claude, gpt, gemini) and can take 60-120+ seconds. Each result has model, label, status, and data fields. Frontend /compare page has all required elements. Previous features (auth, model selector, history) still working.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/compare-models - accepts workflow_description and returns results from all 3 models
POST /api/compare-models - each result has model, label, status, data fields
POST /api/compare-models - model labels match expected (Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Flash)
POST /api/compare-models - comparison saved to workflow history
All previous auth tests (23 passed, 1 skipped)
frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads and accepts admin credentials
Dashboard shows Compare Models link in header
Compare Models link navigates to /compare page
/compare page has back to Dashboard link
/compare page requires authentication (redirects to /login when not logged in)

compare_models_backend.details: POST /api/compare-models runs all 3 AI models in parallel via asyncio.gather. Returns results array with model, label, status, data for each. Requires authentication. Saves comparison to workflow history.

compare_models_frontend.details: /compare page has input textarea, Compare All Models button, back to Dashboard link. Protected by ProtectedRoute (redirects to /login if not authenticated).

dashboard_compare_link.details: Dashboard header has Compare Models link that navigates to /compare page.

previous_features.details: Login, model selector on dashboard, history button all working correctly.
